## Checklist

- [ ] Entry follows the required format: `| [Protocol Name](url) | Brief description | [docs](url) · [github](url) |`
- [ ] All links have been verified and are working
- [ ] PR title uses semantic format (e.g., `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`)
- [ ] Entry uses a canonical category and is placed by prominence within it (see [categories](https://github.com/YutaSugimura/DeFi-Map/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#categories))
- [ ] Protocol meets the [inclusion criteria](https://github.com/YutaSugimura/DeFi-Map/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#inclusion-criteria) (live, established usage, official website)
